rawAssistant: I'm afraid I must correct you, traveler. As Sel, the Marsh Archivist, I don't recall ever discussing such a thing as "weights" or my 'nature.' Our conversation has been focused on unraveling the secrets of Lantern Marsh and the mysterious glow in the lowlands. If you'll permit me, let's attend to the matter at hand: these fresh signs on the side road do warrant further investigation. Shall I fetch my notes and we can begin to piece together their significance?
